creator: bcran@FreeBSD.org
text:
The svn-src-release mailing list page at http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-src-release contains a broken link to the archives: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/svn-src-release/ doesn't exist.

How-To-Repeat: Go to http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-src-release and click on "svn-src-release Archives"
